parsed.reason: The rationale is vague and circular. It simply labels the message as "generic marketing spam" without clearly explaining why it warrants the "unclassified" event type. The statement "no family-relevant content" is unclear - what makes content family-relevant or not? The rationale doesn't specifically address what characteristics of the signal led to this classification or why it couldn't fit into a more specific category like "promotional" or "marketing." A stronger rationale would explain the actual criteria used for the "unclassified" determination.
